# Ben — marketing site, SEO pass

Working through the SEO backlog on the public marketing site (the static
Next.js one, separate repo from the product). Renaming a bunch of URL slugs to
be keyword-friendly and adding redirects so we don't lose the old links —
`/features-list` becomes `/features`, that kind of thing. Also regenerating the
sitemap.

Want the slug rename + redirects merged by end of next week so the crawl picks
them up before the quarter closes. It's all marketing-site content; nothing
touches the app or the API.
